name: space
description: Set a consistent gap between a small group of inline children (Ant Design Space parity): the toolbar/button-cluster spacing primitive. Renders a flex container; direction (horizontal row / vertical column), size (none|small|middle|large mapped onto --lv-space-*, or a raw CSS length), cross-axis align, and wrap (horizontal default true). Differs from flex by intent: Space is the wrap-friendly inline cluster, Flex the general two-axis box; both compile to the same flex utilities. Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the space partial to your JTE root at lievit/space.jte, reached as @template.lievit.space(content=@`...`). Use to space a small cluster of inline controls (buttons, tags) by a consistent gap: size="small|middle|large" (token scale) or a raw length. direction="vertical" stacks; align controls the cross axis; wrap (horizontal) defaults true. The source is yours: edit freely.
